plugin.name: FunnyFarmMadrox
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Plugin consisting of simple requests from Madrox

muclient.aliases: <alias match="^farm reset (?\w+)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="cmd_reset"> <alias match="^farm set (?\w+) (?.+)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="cmd_set"> <alias match="^farm test (?\w+)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="cmd_test"> <alias match="^farm channel (?\w+)$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="cmd_channel"> <alias match="^farmshare(?: (?\w+))?$" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="cmd_share">
muclient.triggers: <trigger name="novorpalcount" enabled="y" group="triviapoints" keep_evaluating="y" omit_from_output="n" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="process_vorpal" match="^Vira's blessing protects you from (?.*)'s vorpal attack\.$" > <trigger name="vorpalcount" enabled="y" group="triviapoints" keep_evaluating="y" omit_from_output="n" regexp="y" sequence="100" script="process_vorpal" match="^Your .* glows brightly and almost decapitates (?.*)\.$" >
muclient.script:
dofile(GetInfo(60) .. "aardwolf_colors.lua") -- Used to support Aard Colors for the cnote() function require 'serialize'
Prepend = "@D[@yMadrox's Funny Farm@D]:@W " DEBUG = false
function isDebug() return DEBUG end -- cnote: echoes a string of Aardwolf @-colour codes locally, in colour. -- The SAME @x text is what gets Sent to the channel, so messages are authored once -- in Aard @x format and look right both in the help echo and on the channel. function cnote(string) AnsiNote(stylesToANSI(ColoursToStyles(string))) end function dnote(string) if isDebug() then cnote( "@r[@RDEBUG@r]: @w" .. string ) end end
----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Events: the seven things we count. -- eventLabel = friendly name shown in the help menu -- tagLabel = the red label used in the auto-appended tail ----------------------------------------------------------------------- local eventOrder = { "tp", "poker", "aarch", "aardword", "noteleport", "vorpal", "novorpal" } local eventLabel = { tp = "Trivia Point", poker = "Poker Card", aarch = "Aarch Piece", aardword = "AardWord Tile", noteleport = "No Teleport", vorpal = "Vorpal", novorpal = "No Vorpal", } local tagLabel = { tp = "Triv Mob", poker = "Poker Card", aarch = "Aarch Piece", aardword = "Aardword Piece", noteleport = "No Teleport", vorpal = "Vorpal", novorpal = "No Vorp", } -- short labels used when sharing totals to a channel (farm spo / farm share) local shareLabel = { tp = "TPs", poker = "Pokers", aarch = "Aarches", aardword = "Tiles", noteleport = "NoTeles", vorpal = "Vorpals", novorpal = "NoVorps", } -- which events use the $victim placeholder in the body local usesVictim = { vorpal = true, novorpal = true }
----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Counters (totals) - stored in the "counters" save variable (unchanged) ----------------------------------------------------------------------- function INIT_counters() counter = { tp = 0, noteleport = 0, vorpal = 0, novorpal = 0, aarch = 0, aardword = 0, poker = 0 } end function SAVE_counters() SetVariable("counters", serialize.save_simple(counter)) end function LOAD_counters() local temp_counters = GetVariable("counters") if temp_counters and temp_counters ~= "" then assert(loadstring("counter = "..temp_counters))() else INIT_counters() end for _, ev in ipairs(eventOrder) do if counter[ev] == nil then counter[ev] = 0 end end end
----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Message BODIES - stored in the "msgbodies" save variable (separate from -- counters). You only ever edit the body; the plugin always appends the tail: -- <space>@R<tagLabel> (@W#@D<count>@R)@w -- Placeholders usable in a body: $victim = mob name (vorpal/novorpal), -- $count = number (not needed; it's in the tail) ----------------------------------------------------------------------- function DEFAULT_bodies() return { tp = [[:@x231ha@x195s @x159foo@x123le@x81d an@x45other m@x39oron@x75 i@x69nto g@x99iving h@x105im@x141 more @x147TP f@x183or h@x189is bun@x225g@x255ho@x231le.]], poker = [[:@r@x231s@x195hu@x159ff@x123le@x81s t@x45he dec@x39k a@x75n@x69d pu@x99lls @x141out@x147 @x183an@x189ot@x225h@x231er @x195jo@x159ke@x123rs@x81 ca@x45rd.]], aarch = [[:@x231re@x195ac@x159he@x123s @x117i@x81nto@x45 the co@x39rpse@x75 @x69and f@x99inds a @x105s@x141trange @x147SAW@x183 lik@x189e game@x225p@x255ie@x231ce.]], aardword = [[:@x231re@x195ac@x159he@x123s @x81int@x45o the c@x39orp@x75se@x69 and@x99 prov@x105i@x141des@x147 @x183a.@x189..s@x255c@x231rabb@x195le@x159 t@x123il@x117e@x81? T@x45ada!]], noteleport = [[:@x231la@x195ugh@x159s @x123li@x117k@x81e an@x45 f'n lu@x39natic@x75 @x69while @x99being @x141way @x147to@x183o @x189THIC@x255K@x231 to @x195fit@x159 in@x123 t@x81hat @x45hole.]], novorpal = [[@W$victim @x231cuts@x195 off M@x159adrox'@x123s hea@x117d.@x81 Madrox @x45says "Hey give me@x39 that back!@x75". @x69You watch in @x99horror as Ma@x105dr@x141ox's hea@x147dless@x183 body@x189 begins t@x255o s@x231crew his@x195 head @x159back on@x123. Dam@x117n@x81it, it's @x45backwards.]], vorpal = [[:@x231ta@x195kes@x159 th@x123e @x81head@x45 clean of@x39f of @W$victim@x75.@x69 He th@x99en wri@x141tes @x147th@x183eir@x189 na@x225m@x255e@x231 int@x195o t@x159he @Ggreen @x45book.]], } end function INIT_bodies() bodies = DEFAULT_bodies() end function SAVE_bodies() SetVariable("msgbodies", serialize.save_simple(bodies)) end function LOAD_bodies() local saved = GetVariable("msgbodies") if saved and saved ~= "" then assert(loadstring("bodies = "..saved))() local d = DEFAULT_bodies() for k, v in pairs(d) do if bodies[k] == nil then bodies[k] = v end end else INIT_bodies() end end
----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Channel - stored in "ff_channel" (default: spouse) ----------------------------------------------------------------------- function LOAD_channel() channel = GetVariable("ff_channel") if not channel or channel == "" then channel = "spouse" end end
----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Building / firing a message ----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Function replacements so a victim name containing '%' can't corrupt the result. function formatMsg(template, count, victim) local s = template:gsub("%$count", function() return tostring(count) end) s = s:gsub("%$victim", function() return victim or "" end) return s end
-- The consistent tail every message ends with. function tailFor(event, count) return (" @R%s (@W#@D%d@R)@w"):format(tagLabel[event] or "", count) end
-- Full assembled message = body (placeholders filled, trailing space trimmed) + tail. function assemble(event, count, victim) local body = formatMsg(bodies[event] or "", count, victim) body = body:gsub("%s+$", "") return body .. tailFor(event, count) end
function fire(event, victim) counter[event] = (counter[event] or 0) + 1 Send( channel .. " " .. assemble(event, counter[event], victim) ) SAVE_counters() end
function process_trivia_point (name, line, args, styles) fire("tp") end function process_poker (name, line, args, styles) fire("poker") end function process_aarch (name, line, args, styles) fire("aarch") end function process_aardword (name, line, args, styles) fire("aardword") end function process_noteleport (name, line, args, styles) fire("noteleport") end function process_vorpal (name, line, args, styles) if name == "novorpalcount" then fire("novorpal", args.victim) elseif name == "vorpalcount" then fire("vorpal", args.victim) end end
----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Commands ----------------------------------------------------------------------- local function knownEvent(ev) return bodies[ev] ~= nil end local function eventList() return table.concat(eventOrder, ", ") end
function cmd_help (name, line, args) cnote("") cnote("@D===== @YMadrox's Funny Farm@D =====@w") cnote("@wChannel: @C" .. channel .. "@w @D(change with @Wfarm channel <name>@D)@w") cnote("@wEvery message auto-ends with its tag: @D(space)@R<Label> (@W#@D<count>@R)@w") cnote("@wSo @Wfarm set <event> <text>@w only sets the part BEFORE that tag.") cnote("@wStart a body with @C:@w to make it a channel emote. Use @C$victim@w in vorpal/novorpal.") cnote("") for _, ev in ipairs(eventOrder) do local extra = usesVictim[ev] and " @D[uses @C$victim@D]@w" or "" cnote(("@W%-11s@w @D(%s)@w @wcount: @C%d@w @D[tag: @R%s@D]@w%s"):format( ev, eventLabel[ev] or ev, counter[ev] or 0, tagLabel[ev] or "", extra)) cnote(" @D(body)@w " .. (bodies[ev] or "") .. "@w") end cnote("") cnote("@wCommands:@w") cnote(" @Wfarm@w / @Wfarm help@w show this menu") cnote(" @Wfarm set <event> <text>@w set the body (everything before the tag)") cnote(" @Wfarm reset <event>@w reset one body to default") cnote(" @Wfarm reset all@w reset every body to default") cnote(" @Wfarm test <event>@w preview the full message locally (does not send)") cnote(" @Wfarm channel <name>@w set the channel the event messages use") cnote(" @Wfarmshare [channel]@w share all totals to a channel @D(e.g. @Wfarmshare spo@D)@w") cnote("@D(events: @w" .. eventList() .. "@D)@w") cnote("") end
function cmd_set (name, line, args) local ev = args.event:lower() if not knownEvent(ev) then cnote("@RUnknown event '@W" .. ev .. "@R'. Valid events: @w" .. eventList()) return end bodies[ev] = (args.msg):gsub("%s+$", "") SAVE_bodies() cnote("@G" .. ev .. " body set. Full message preview:@w") local victim = usesVictim[ev] and "SomeMob" or nil cnote(" " .. assemble(ev, counter[ev] or 0, victim)) end
function cmd_reset (name, line, args) local d = DEFAULT_bodies() if not args.event or args.event == "" or args.event:lower() == "all" then bodies = d SAVE_bodies() cnote("@GAll message bodies reset to default.@w") return end local ev = args.event:lower() if d[ev] == nil then cnote("@RUnknown event '@W" .. ev .. "@R'. Valid events: @w" .. eventList()) return end bodies[ev] = d[ev] SAVE_bodies() cnote("@G" .. ev .. " reset. Full message preview:@w") local victim = usesVictim[ev] and "SomeMob" or nil cnote(" " .. assemble(ev, counter[ev] or 0, victim)) end
function cmd_test (name, line, args) local ev = args.event:lower() if not knownEvent(ev) then cnote("@RUnknown event '@W" .. ev .. "@R'. Valid events: @w" .. eventList()) return end local victim = usesVictim[ev] and "SomeMob" or nil cnote("@wWould send to @C" .. channel .. "@w:") cnote(" " .. channel .. " " .. assemble(ev, (counter[ev] or 0) + 1, victim)) end
function cmd_channel (name, line, args) channel = args.channel SetVariable("ff_channel", channel) cnote("@GChannel set to @C" .. channel .. "@w") end
-- Build the totals line: labels in @x099, numbers in @W. function buildTotals() local parts = {} for _, ev in ipairs(eventOrder) do table.insert(parts, ("@x099%s: @W%d"):format(shareLabel[ev] or ev, counter[ev] or 0)) end return table.concat(parts, " ") .. "@w" end
function ShareTotals(chan) Send( chan .. " " .. buildTotals() ) end
function cmd_share (name, line, args) local chan = (args.channel and args.channel ~= "") and args.channel or channel ShareTotals(chan) end
----------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Lifecycle ----------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginEnable() LOAD_counters() LOAD_bodies() LOAD_channel() end function OnPluginInstall() OnPluginEnable() cnote("@wMadrox's Funny Farm loaded. Type @Wfarm help@w for messages and commands.") end
